items.title: Petrol and diesel prices rise again as concerns grow over ceasefire
items.dek: Motoring groups have warned drivers not to expect a significant drop in costs soon.
items.body: Motoring groups have warned drivers not to expect a significant drop in costs soon.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Argentina passes bill loosening protection of its glaciers
items.dek: The new bill will make it easier for provincial governments to allow mining projects in glacier regions.
items.body: The new bill will make it easier for provincial governments to allow mining projects in glacier regions.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Netanyahu on the ceasefire: “Ceasefire? Yes, I see fire, I see destruction, and I see victory for Israel.” “I also “sees” the Epstein files.”
items.author: IriLine Desk
